subject: Weekly Metrics Digest - March 1, 2026
body:
Hello Leadership,

Please find below this week's product metrics summary:

**ACTIVE USERS**
↑ 3% (Week-over-Week)
Continued steady growth in user engagement across all segments.

**API CALL VOLUME**
Stable
Consistent platform usage with no significant fluctuations.

**ERROR RATE**
↓ 0.1% (Week-over-Week)
Improved reliability; system performance remains strong.

**UPTIME**
99.97%
Exceptional platform availability maintained throughout the week.

All key metrics remain within target ranges. No issues requiring immediate attention.

Best regards,
Internal Communications
